scenarios.description: clone() produces a new Document with identical state but independent outputSettings and parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document != original; returned.baseUri == original.baseUri; returned.location() == original.location(); returned.outputSettings() equals original.outputSettings() but returned.outputSettings() != original.outputSettings(); returned.parser() equals original.parser() but returned.parser() != original.parser();

scenarios.description: clone() retains original modifications and ensures subsequent changes to clone do not affect original
scenarios.expectedResult: after original.outputSettings().indentAmount(5) and original.parser().settings modified, clone reflects those modifications at clone-time; then clone.outputSettings().indentAmount changed to 2 does not change original.outputSettings().indentAmount (remains 5); clone.parser modifications do not propagate to original.parser
pseudocode: TEST TC02 clone independence after mutation
